title: Tech Ascension
description: Lightweight 1.20.1 Tech Modpack featuring Mekanism, AE2, Ad Astra, Immersive Engineering, Thermal series and more!
body:
![Tech Ascension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34a976e7bebedbb1d664fb340d82a291516f0d48_0.webp)

## Welcome to Tech Ascension!
A tech-based modpack featuring mods such as **Mekanism**, **AE2**, **Ad Astr**, **Immersive Engineering**, **Thermal Series**, **Powah** and more!

**You can also explore the world with over 100 biomes and additional structures!**

Don't forget to [join the discord](https://discord.gg/AdDkBRbvNq) and most importantly, **have fun**!
